rationale: Optimized trade-off. Trend=0.4 (Separation), Risk=0.4 (Speed), Liq=0.2 (Support). Tight VIX for fast reaction.

trend.description: Primary Separation Driver. Keeps Cohen D high.

liquidity.description: Supporting Role. Fast lookback (10d) to match Risk speed.

risk_appetite.description: Primary Speed Driver. Tight thresholds force GFC/COVID reaction.
